session.expiredHint: Please sign in again to continue.

forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.

errors.loginFailed: Could not sign in (status {status}). Please try again.
errors.serverUnreachable: Could not reach the server. Check that cms-api is running.

acceptInvite.title: Set up your account
acceptInvite.subtitle: You have been invited to {tenant}. Choose a password and you are in.
acceptInvite.emailHint: This is the address the invitation was sent to. It cannot be changed here.
acceptInvite.name: Your name
acceptInvite.passwordHint: At least {min} characters. Length is what makes a password hard to guess — a passphrase beats a short one with symbols in it.
acceptInvite.invalidBody: The link may have been used already, withdrawn, or expired. Ask whoever invited you for a new one.
acceptInvite.missingToken: This link is missing its invitation token.
acceptInvite.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match.

mfa.prompt: Your password was accepted. Now the code from your authenticator app.
mfa.codeHint: Six digits from your authenticator — or one of your recovery codes if your phone is gone.
mfa.tooManyAttempts: Too many wrong codes. This account will not accept a code for the next 15 minutes.
mfa.challengeExpired: This sign-in attempt has expired. Enter your password again.
